output.summary: Successfully converted ContentWithMedia block from using description and buttons attributes to InnerBlocks. ThemeHeading now only handles eyebrow and heading. InnerBlocks allows core/paragraph, core/list, core/quote, core/separator, and takt/button-row (no headings). Added deprecation handler to automatically migrate existing blocks.

changes: Removed 'description' attribute
Removed 'buttons' attribute
Updated 'example' section to use innerBlocks instead of description/buttons attributes
Added useInnerBlocksProps import from @wordpress/block-editor
Removed description and buttons from ContentWithMediaAttributes type
Added ALLOWED_BLOCKS constant: ['core/paragraph', 'core/list', 'core/quote', 'core/separator', 'takt/button-row']
Added TEMPLATE constant with default paragraph and button-row
Created innerBlocksProps using useInnerBlocksProps with 'discourse' class wrapper
Changed content column wrapper from 'flex items-center' to 'flex flex-col justify-center gap-8'
Updated ThemeHeading to pass enableDescription={false} and enableButtons={false}
Removed description and buttons props from ThemeHeading
Added InnerBlocks render after ThemeHeading using <div {...innerBlocksProps} />
Removed @var annotations for $description and $buttons
Added @var string $children annotation for InnerBlocks content
Changed content column wrapper from 'flex items-center' to 'flex flex-col justify-center gap-8'
Updated ThemeHeading get_template_part to remove description and buttons keys
Added 'enableDescription' => false and 'enableButtons' => false to ThemeHeading
Added InnerBlocks rendering:
Added createBlock import from @wordpress/blocks
Added deprecated array with migration handler
Migration converts old description attribute to core/paragraph block
Migration converts old buttons array to takt/button-row with takt/button children
Preserves all existing data during migration

deprecationHandler.purpose: Automatically migrate existing blocks with description/buttons attributes to InnerBlocks
deprecationHandler.behavior: Converts description to paragraph block, buttons array to button-row with button children

warnings: Performance warnings about bundle size (not related to this change)
Pre-existing warnings in other files (not related to this change)

variations.title: Image Gallery - Full Content
variations.description: Gallery layout with eyebrow, heading, paragraph, and button

variations.title: Image Gallery - Reversed
variations.description: Gallery layout with reversed columns (media on right)

variations.title: Single Image - Dark Mode
variations.description: Single image layout with dark mode background

variations.title: Video - YouTube Embed
variations.description: Video content with YouTube embed and poster image

variations.title: Minimal Content
variations.description: Block with only heading and single paragraph

tSXtoPHPSync: Content column wrapper: 'flex flex-col justify-center gap-8' matches in both
ThemeHeading: enableDescription={false} and enableButtons={false} match in both
InnerBlocks wrapper: 'discourse' class matches in both

userDecisionsImplemented.decision: Add discourse class to InnerBlocks wrapper

userDecisionsImplemented.location: index.tsx deprecated array with migrate function
